# pxgrid_template (Data Source)

Consulta template LXC disponível no storage.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file_name` (String) Nome do template (ex.: debian-12-standard_12.0-1_amd64.tar.zst).
- `node_name` (String) Nó onde o storage reside.
- `storage` (String) Storage (ex.: local).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Volid do template.
